preliminary_idea: Develop a trading bot for the stock market
specified_task: Develop a trading bot with a sentiment analysis tool that can monitor social media platforms for positive or negative comments about a particular stock, and execute trades based on sentiment analysis results

conversation.next: At next time step t+1, AI user U takes history M_t and generates I_{t+1}, assistant A generates S_{t+1}

example.Instruction: Install necessary Python libraries for sentiment analysis and stock trading
example.Solution: pip install tweepy textblob yfinance Next request
import tweepy from textblob import TextBlob ... Next request

conversation.termination: task completed or max messages limit cost grows quadratically
conversation.mitigation: inception prompting + PA PU system messages

system_messages.PA: You are {{assistant_role}} task executor offer solutions execute planned steps provide responses to AI user {{user_role}} Avoid role flipping Avoid repeating instructions Avoid flake replies Avoid infinite loop Conversation history {{Mt}} Current instruction {{It}} Solution:
system_messages.PU: You are {{user_role}} task planner interactive planning feasible steps for AI assistant {{assistant_role}} Provide instructions guide assistant toward task completion Format Instruction Input Evaluate if task completed Maintain consistency human intentions {{human_idea}} Avoid role flipping Provide feasible steps Conversation history {{Mt}} Current assistant solution {{St}} Instruction:
system_messages.formal: A <- F_{PA}, U <- F_{PU}, F1 F2 large-scale auto-regressive LMs

inception_prompting: conversational LLM auto-prompting method enables agents to prompt each other to solve tasks through Role-Playing AI user continuously provides instructions AI assistant for task-solving Save streaming instruction-solution pairs create diverse instructional conversational task-oriented datasets

data_generation.assistant_role_generation: You are helpful assistant that can play many different roles Now please list <NUM_ROLES> different roles that you can play with your expertise in diverse fields Sort them by alphabetical order No explanation required
data_generation.user_role_generation: Please list <NUM_ROLES> most common and diverse groups of internet users or occupations Use singular form No explanation Sort alphabetical No explanation required
data_generation.task_generation: List <NUM_TASKS> diverse tasks that <ASSISTANT_ROLE> can assist <USER_ROLE> cooperatively to achieve together Be concise Be creative
